verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce servus meus, suscipiam eum ;  electus meus, complacuit sibi in illo anima mea :  dedi spiritum meum super eum :  judicium gentibus proferet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֵ֤ן עַבְדִּי֙ אֶתְמׇךְ־בּ֔וֹ בְּחִירִ֖י רָצְתָ֣ה נַפְשִׁ֑י נָתַ֤תִּי רוּחִי֙ עָלָ֔יו מִשְׁפָּ֖ט לַגּוֹיִ֥ם יוֹצִֽיא׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold my servant, I will uphold him: my elect, my soul delighteth in him: I have given my spirit upon him, he shall bring forth judgment to the Gentiles.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, minun palveliani, minä häntä tuen, ja minun valittuni, jossa minun sieluni mielistyi. Minä olen hänelle minun Henkeni antanut, hänen pitää oikeuden saattaman pakanoille.
verses.king_james: Behold my servant, whom I uphold; mine elect, in whom my soul delighteth; I have put my spirit upon him: he shall bring forth judgment to the Gentiles.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non clamabit, neque accipiet personam,  nec audietur vox ejus foris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹ֥א יִצְעַ֖ק וְלֹ֣א יִשָּׂ֑א וְלֹא־יַשְׁמִ֥יעַ בַּח֖וּץ קוֹלֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He shall not cry, nor have respect to person, neither shall his voice be heard abroad.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei hän huuda, eikä riitele, ja hänen ääntänsä ei kuulla kaduilla.
verses.king_james: He shall not cry, nor lift up, nor cause his voice to be heard in the street.

verses.latin_vulgate: Calamum quassatum non conteret,  et linum fumigans non extinguet :  in veritate educet judicium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קָנֶ֤ה רָצוּץ֙ לֹ֣א יִשְׁבּ֔וֹר וּפִשְׁתָּ֥ה כֵהָ֖ה לֹ֣א יְכַבֶּ֑נָּה לֶאֱמֶ֖ת יוֹצִ֥יא מִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.douay_rheims: The bruised reed he shall not break, and smoking flax he shall not quench, he shall bring forth judgment unto truth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Särjettyä ruokoa ei hänen pidä murentaman, ja suitsevaista kynttilän sydäntä ei pidä hänen sammuttaman; hän saattaa oikeuden totuudella.
verses.king_james: A bruised reed shall he not break, and the smoking flax shall he not quench: he shall bring forth judgment unto truth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non erit tristis, neque turbulentus,  donec ponat in terra judicium ;  et legem ejus insulæ exspectabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹ֤א יִכְהֶה֙ וְלֹ֣א יָר֔וּץ עַד־יָשִׂ֥ים בָּאָ֖רֶץ מִשְׁפָּ֑ט וּלְתוֹרָת֖וֹ אִיִּ֥ים יְיַחֵֽלוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: He shall not be sad, nor troublesome, till he set judgment in the earth, and the islands shall wait for his law.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei hänen pidä nurjan eikä hirmuisen oleman, sillä hänen pitää oikeuden maan päälle säätämän; ja luodotkin pitää hänen lakiansa odottaman.
verses.king_james: He shall not fail nor be discouraged, till he have set judgment in the earth: and the isles shall wait for his law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus Deus,  creans cælos, et extendens eos ;  firmans terram, et quæ germinant ex ea ;  dans flatum populo qui est super eam,  et spiritum calcantibus eam :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּה־אָמַ֞ר הָאֵ֣ל ׀ יְהֹוָ֗ה בּוֹרֵ֤א הַשָּׁמַ֙יִם֙ וְנ֣וֹטֵיהֶ֔ם רֹקַ֥ע הָאָ֖רֶץ וְצֶאֱצָאֶ֑יהָ נֹתֵ֤ן נְשָׁמָה֙ לָעָ֣ם עָלֶ֔יהָ וְר֖וּחַ לַהֹלְכִ֥ים בָּֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thus saith the Lord God that created the heavens, and stretched them out: that established the earth, and the things that spring out of it: that giveth breath to the people upon it, and spirit to them that tread thereon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näitä sanoo Herra Jumala, joka luo taivaat, ja venyttää ne, joka levittää maan, ja hänen kasvonsa; joka kansalle, joka sen päällä on, hengittämisen antaa, ja hengen niille, jotka siinä käyvät.
verses.king_james: Thus saith God the Lord, he that created the heavens, and stretched them out; he that spread forth the earth, and that which cometh out of it; he that giveth breath unto the people upon it, and spirit to them that walk therein:

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego Dominus vocavi te in justitia,  et apprehendi manum tuam,  et servavi te :  et dedi te in fœdus populi,  in lucem gentium,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲנִ֧י יְהֹוָ֛ה קְרָאתִ֥יךָֽ בְצֶ֖דֶק וְאַחְזֵ֣ק בְּיָדֶ֑ךָ וְאֶצׇּרְךָ֗ וְאֶתֶּנְךָ֛ לִבְרִ֥ית עָ֖ם לְא֥וֹר גּוֹיִֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: I the Lord have called thee in justice, and taken thee by the hand, and preserved thee. And I have given thee for a covenant of the people, for a light of the Gentiles:
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä Herra olen sinun kutsunut vanhurskaudessa, ja rupesin sinun kätees, ja varjelin sinua, ja olen sinun antanut kansoille liitoksi ja pakanoille valkeudeksi.
verses.king_james: I the Lord have called thee in righteousness, and will hold thine hand, and will keep thee, and give thee for a covenant of the people, for a light of the Gentiles;

verses.latin_vulgate: ut aperires oculos cæcorum,  et educeres de conclusione vinctum,  de domo carceris sedentes in tenebris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִפְקֹ֖חַ עֵינַ֣יִם עִוְר֑וֹת לְהוֹצִ֤יא מִמַּסְגֵּר֙ אַסִּ֔יר מִבֵּ֥ית כֶּ֖לֶא יֹ֥שְׁבֵי חֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: That thou mightest open the eyes of the blind, and bring forth the prisoner out of prison, and them that sit in darkness out of the prison house.
verses.finnish_biblia: Avaamaan sokiain silmiä, ja vankeja pelastamaan vankeudesta, ja tornista niitä, jotka pimeydessä istuvat.
verses.king_james: To open the blind eyes, to bring out the prisoners from the prison, and them that sit in darkness out of the prison house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego Dominus,  hoc est nomen meum ;  gloriam meam alteri non dabo,  et laudem meam sculptilibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה ה֣וּא שְׁמִ֑י וּכְבוֹדִי֙ לְאַחֵ֣ר לֹֽא־אֶתֵּ֔ן וּתְהִלָּתִ֖י לַפְּסִילִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: I the Lord, this is my name: I will not give my glory to another, nor my praise to graven things.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä Herra, se on minun nimeni: en minä anna toiselle kunniaani, enkä ylistystäni epäjumalille.
verses.king_james: I am the Lord: that is my name: and my glory will I not give to another, neither my praise to graven images.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quæ prima fuerunt, ecce venerunt ;  nova quoque ego annuntio :  antequam oriantur,  audita vobis faciam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָרִאשֹׁנ֖וֹת הִנֵּה־בָ֑אוּ וַֽחֲדָשׁוֹת֙ אֲנִ֣י מַגִּ֔יד בְּטֶ֥רֶם תִּצְמַ֖חְנָה אַשְׁמִ֥יעַ אֶתְכֶֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The things that were first, behold they are come: and new things do I declare: before they spring forth, I will make you hear them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, entiset ovat tapahtuneet, ja vastuutista minä ilmoitan; ennenkuin se tapahtuu, annan minä teidän sen kuulla.
verses.king_james: Behold, the former things are come to pass, and new things do I declare: before they spring forth I tell you of them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cantate Domino canticum novum,  laus ejus ab extremis terræ,  qui descenditis in mare, et plenitudo ejus ;  insulæ, et habitatores earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁ֤ירוּ לַֽיהֹוָה֙ שִׁ֣יר חָדָ֔שׁ תְּהִלָּת֖וֹ מִקְצֵ֣ה הָאָ֑רֶץ יוֹרְדֵ֤י הַיָּם֙ וּמְלֹא֔וֹ אִיִּ֖ים וְיֹשְׁבֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Sing ye to the Lord a new song, his praise is from the ends of the earth: you that go down to the sea, and all that are therein: ye islands, and ye inhabitants of them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Veisatkaat Herralle uutta veisua; hänen ylistyksensä on maailman äärestä, jotka meressä vaellatte, ja mitä siinä on, luodot, ja jotka niissä asutte.
verses.king_james: Sing unto the Lord a new song, and his praise from the end of the earth, ye that go down to the sea, and all that is therein; the isles, and the inhabitants thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sublevetur desertum et civitates ejus.  In domibus habitabit Cedar :  laudate, habitatores petræ ;  de vertice montium clamabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִשְׂא֤וּ מִדְבָּר֙ וְעָרָ֔יו חֲצֵרִ֖ים תֵּשֵׁ֣ב קֵדָ֑ר יָרֹ֙נּוּ֙ יֹ֣שְׁבֵי סֶ֔לַע מֵרֹ֥אשׁ הָרִ֖ים יִצְוָֽחוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let the desert and the cities thereof be exalted: Cedar shall dwell in houses: ye inhabitants of Petra, give praise, they shall cry from the top of the mountains.
verses.finnish_biblia: Huutakaat korkiasti, te korvet ja kaupungit niissä, ja ne kylät, joissa Kedar asuu; riemuitkaan ne, jotka kallioissa asuvat, ja huutakaan vuorten kukkuloilta.
verses.king_james: Let the wilderness and the cities thereof lift up their voice, the villages that Kedar doth inhabit: let the inhabitants of the rock sing, let them shout from the top of the mountains.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ponent Domino gloriam,  et laudem ejus in insulis nuntiabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָשִׂ֥ימוּ לַיהֹוָ֖ה כָּב֑וֹד וּתְהִלָּת֖וֹ בָּאִיִּ֥ים יַגִּֽידוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: They shall give glory to the Lord, and shall declare his praise in the islands.
verses.finnish_biblia: Antakaan Herralle kunnia, ja hänen nimensä luodoissa ilmoittakaan.
verses.king_james: Let them give glory unto the Lord, and declare his praise in the islands.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus sicut fortis egredietur,  sicut vir præliator suscitabit zelum ;  vociferabitur, et clamabit :  super inimicos suos confortabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָה֙ כַּגִּבּ֣וֹר יֵצֵ֔א כְּאִ֥ישׁ מִלְחָמ֖וֹת יָעִ֣יר קִנְאָ֑ה יָרִ֙יעַ֙ אַף־יַצְרִ֔יחַ עַל־אֹיְבָ֖יו יִתְגַּבָּֽר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord shall go forth as a mighty man, as a man of war shall he stir up zeal: he shall shout and cry: he shall prevail against his enemies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra käy niinkuin sankari ulos, hän herättää kiivautensa niinkuin sotamies; hän riemuitsee ja huutaa, hän voittaa vihollisensa.
verses.king_james: The Lord shall go forth as a mighty man, he shall stir up jealousy like a man of war: he shall cry, yea, roar; he shall prevail against his enemies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tacui semper,  silui, patiens fui :  sicut parturiens loquar ;  dissipabo, et absorbebo simul.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֶחֱשֵׁ֙יתִי֙ מֵֽעוֹלָ֔ם אַחֲרִ֖ישׁ אֶתְאַפָּ֑ק כַּיּוֹלֵדָ֣ה אֶפְעֶ֔ה אֶשֹּׁ֥ם וְאֶשְׁאַ֖ף יָֽחַד׃
verses.douay_rheims: I have always held my peace, I have kept silence, I have been patient, I will speak now as a woman in labour: I will destroy, and swallow up at once.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhasta minä olen vaiti ollut, olin hiljainen ja pidätin itseni; mutta nyt minä tahdon huutaa niinkuin synnyttäjä, minä tahdon hävittää ja kaikki niellä.
verses.king_james: I have long time holden my peace; I have been still, and refrained myself: now will I cry like a travailing woman; I will destroy and devour at once.

verses.latin_vulgate: Desertos faciam montes et colles,  et omne gramen eorum exsiccabo ;  et ponam flumina in insulas,  et stagna arefaciam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַחֲרִ֤יב הָרִים֙ וּגְבָע֔וֹת וְכׇל־עֶשְׂבָּ֖ם אוֹבִ֑ישׁ וְשַׂמְתִּ֤י נְהָרוֹת֙ לָאִיִּ֔ים וַאֲגַמִּ֖ים אוֹבִֽישׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will lay waste the mountains and hills, and will make all their grass to wither: and I will turn rivers into islands, and will dry up the standing pools.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä hävitän vuoret ja kukkulat, ja annan kaikki heidän ruohonsa kuivua; minä teen virrat luodoiksi, ja järvet kuivaan pois.
verses.king_james: I will make waste mountains and hills, and dry up all their herbs; and I will make the rivers islands, and I will dry up the pools.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ducam cæcos in viam quam nesciunt,  et in semitis quas ignoraverunt ambulare eos faciam ;  ponam tenebras coram eis in lucem,  et prava in recta ;  hæc verba feci eis,  et non dereliqui eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהוֹלַכְתִּ֣י עִוְרִ֗ים בְּדֶ֙רֶךְ֙ לֹ֣א יָדָ֔עוּ בִּנְתִיב֥וֹת לֹא־יָדְע֖וּ אַדְרִיכֵ֑ם אָשִׂים֩ מַחְשָׁ֨ךְ לִפְנֵיהֶ֜ם לָא֗וֹר וּמַֽעֲקַשִּׁים֙ לְמִישׁ֔וֹר אֵ֚לֶּה הַדְּבָרִ֔ים עֲשִׂיתִ֖ם וְלֹ֥א עֲזַבְתִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will lead the blind into the way which they know not: and in the paths which they were ignorant of I will make them walk: I will make darkness light before them, and crooked things straight: these things have I done to them, and have not forsaken them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta sokiat minä johdatan sitä tietä, jota ei he tiedä, minä vien heidät niitä polkuja, joita ei he tunne; minä teen heille pimeyden valkeudeksi ja kolian tasaiseksi, näitä tahdon minä heille tehdä, ja en hylkää heitä.
verses.king_james: And I will bring the blind by a way that they knew not; I will lead them in paths that they have not known: I will make darkness light before them, and crooked things straight. These things will I do unto them, and not forsake them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Conversi sunt retrorsum, confundantur confusione,  qui confidunt in sculptili ;  qui dicunt conflatili :  Vos dii nostri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָסֹ֤גוּ אָחוֹר֙ יֵבֹ֣שׁוּ בֹ֔שֶׁת הַבֹּטְחִ֖ים בַּפָּ֑סֶל הָאֹמְרִ֥ים לְמַסֵּכָ֖ה אַתֶּ֥ם אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: They are turned back: let them be greatly confounded, that trust in a graven thing, that say to a molten thing: You are our god.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta niiden pitää kääntymän takaperin, ja häpiään tuleman, jotka uskaltavat epäjumaliin ja sanovat valetuille kuville: te olette meidän Jumalamme.
verses.king_james: They shall be turned back, they shall be greatly ashamed, that trust in graven images, that say to the molten images, Ye are our gods.

verses.latin_vulgate: Surdi, audite,  et cæci, intuemini ad videndum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַחֵרְשִׁ֖ים שְׁמָ֑עוּ וְהַעִוְרִ֖ים הַבִּ֥יטוּ לִרְאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Hear, ye deaf, and, ye blind, behold that you may see.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuulkaat, te kuurot, ja katsokaat, te sokiat, että te näkisitte.
verses.king_james: Hear, ye deaf; and look, ye blind, that ye may see.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis cæcus, nisi servus meus ;  et surdus, nisi ad quem nuntios meos misi ?  quis cæcus, nisi qui venundatus est ?  et quis cæcus, nisi servus Domini ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֤י עִוֵּר֙ כִּ֣י אִם־עַבְדִּ֔י וְחֵרֵ֖שׁ כְּמַלְאָכִ֣י אֶשְׁלָ֑ח מִ֤י עִוֵּר֙ כִּמְשֻׁלָּ֔ם וְעִוֵּ֖ר כְּעֶ֥בֶד יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who is blind, but my servant? or deaf, but he to whom I have sent my messengers? Who is blind, but he that is sold? or who is blind, but the servant of the Lord?
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuka on niin sokia kuin minun palveliani? ja kuka on niin kuuro kuin minun käskyläiseni, jonka minä lähetän? Kuka on niin sokia kuin se täydellinen? ja niin sokia kuin Herran palvelia?
verses.king_james: Who is blind, but my servant? or deaf, as my messenger that I sent? who is blind as he that is perfect, and blind as the Lord’s servant?

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui vides multa, nonne custodies ?  qui apertas habes aures, nonne audies ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (ראית) [רָא֥וֹת] רַבּ֖וֹת וְלֹ֣א תִשְׁמֹ֑ר פָּק֥וֹחַ אׇזְנַ֖יִם וְלֹ֥א יִשְׁמָֽע׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou that seest many things, wilt thou not observe them? thou that hast ears open, wilt thou not hear?
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä näet paljon, ja et kuitenkaan pidä; korvat ovat avoimet, ja ei kenkään kuule.
verses.king_james: Seeing many things, but thou observest not; opening the ears, but he heareth not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Dominus voluit ut sanctificaret eum,  et magnificaret legem, et extolleret.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֥ה חָפֵ֖ץ לְמַ֣עַן צִדְק֑וֹ יַגְדִּ֥יל תּוֹרָ֖ה וְיַאְדִּֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord was willing to sanctify him, and to magnify the law, and exalt it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuitenkin suo Herra heille hyvää vanhurskautensa tähden, hän tekee lakinsa suureksi ja kunnialliseksi.
verses.king_james: The Lord is well pleased for his righteousness’ sake; he will magnify the law, and make it honourable.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse autem populus direptus, et vastatus ;  laqueus juvenum omnes,  et in domibus carcerum absconditi sunt ;  facti sunt in rapinam, nec est qui eruat ;  in direptionem, nec est qui dicat : Redde.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהוּא֮ עַם־בָּז֣וּז וְשָׁסוּי֒ הָפֵ֤חַ בַּחוּרִים֙ כֻּלָּ֔ם וּבְבָתֵּ֥י כְלָאִ֖ים הׇחְבָּ֑אוּ הָי֤וּ לָבַז֙ וְאֵ֣ין מַצִּ֔יל מְשִׁסָּ֖ה וְאֵין־אֹמֵ֥ר הָשַֽׁב׃
verses.douay_rheims: But this is a people that is robbed and wasted: they are all the snare of young men, and they are hid in the houses of prisons: they are made a prey, and there is none to deliver them: a spoil, and there is none that saith: Restore.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta se on raadeltu ja ryöstetty kansa; he ovat kaikki saadut kiinni kuopasta, ja vankein huoneeseen lymytetyt; he ovat tehdyt saaliiksi, eikä ole yhtään auttajaa, raadellut, ja ei kuitenkaan sano: tuo ne jälleen.
verses.king_james: But this is a people robbed and spoiled; they are all of them snared in holes, and they are hid in prison houses: they are for a prey, and none delivereth; for a spoil, and none saith, Restore.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis est in vobis qui audiat hoc,  attendat, et auscultet futura ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֥י בָכֶ֖ם יַאֲזִ֣ין זֹ֑את יַקְשִׁ֥ב וְיִשְׁמַ֖ע לְאָחֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who is there among you that will give ear to this, that will attend and hearken for times to come?
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuka on teidän seassanne, joka näitä ottaa korviinsa? hän havaitkaan ja kuulkaan, mitä tästedes tulee.
verses.king_james: Who among you will give ear to this? who will hearken and hear for the time to come?

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis dedit in direptionem Jacob,  et Israël vastantibus ?  nonne Dominus ipse, cui peccavimus ?  Et noluerunt in viis ejus ambulare,  et non audierunt legem ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִֽי־נָתַ֨ן (למשוסה) [לִמְשִׁסָּ֧ה] יַעֲקֹ֛ב וְיִשְׂרָאֵ֥ל לְבֹזְזִ֖ים הֲל֣וֹא יְהֹוָ֑ה ז֚וּ חָטָ֣אנוּ ל֔וֹ וְלֹֽא־אָב֤וּ בִדְרָכָיו֙ הָל֔וֹךְ וְלֹ֥א שָׁמְע֖וּ בְּתוֹרָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who hath given Jacob for a spoil, and Israel to robbers? hath not the Lord himself, against whom we have sinned? And they would not walk in his ways, and they have not hearkened to his law.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuka on Jakobin raatelukseksi antanut, ja Israelin ryöväreille? Eikö Herra itse, jota vastaan me syntiä tehneet olemme? Ja ei he tahtoneet hänen teillänsä vaeltaa, eikä totelleet hänen lakiansa.
verses.king_james: Who gave Jacob for a spoil, and Israel to the robbers? did not the Lord, he against whom we have sinned? for they would not walk in his ways, neither were they obedient unto his law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et effudit super eum indignationem furoris sui,  et forte bellum ;  et combussit eum in circuitu, et non cognovit ;  et succendit eum, et non intellexit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁפֹּ֤ךְ עָלָיו֙ חֵמָ֣ה אַפּ֔וֹ וֶעֱז֖וּז מִלְחָמָ֑ה וַתְּלַהֲטֵ֤הוּ מִסָּבִיב֙ וְלֹ֣א יָדָ֔ע וַתִּבְעַר־בּ֖וֹ וְלֹא־יָשִׂ֥ים עַל־לֵֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he hath poured out upon him the indignation of his fury, and a strong battle, and hath burnt him round about, and he knew not: and set him on fire, and he understood not.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden on hän heidän päällensä vuodattanut vihansa hirmuisuuden ja väkevän sodan: ja on heidät sytyttänyt ympäri, mutta ei he tunteneet, ja hän sytytti heitä, mutta ei he sitä ottaneet mieleensä.
verses.king_james: Therefore he hath poured upon him the fury of his anger, and the strength of battle: and it hath set him on fire round about, yet he knew not; and it burned him, yet he laid it not to heart.
